Notes: SMSU ranked ninth in the region...CSP ranked fourth in the region...Michelle
Bruns breaks the school record for three-pointers made in a career with 182...
Bruns moves into third place on the SMSU all-time scoring list with 1,587
points...SMSU snaps six-game losing streak against CSP.
Game.Officials: Tom Knoblauch,  Jeff Schmit,  Pete Cieluch
